dynamic-element.name: content
dynamic-element.dynamic-content: The Liferay Community Meetup is back with in-person events across three regions and a fully online track for everyone else. Talks will cover real-world architecture patterns, contributions to the open-source codebase, and a deep dive into the upcoming roadmap. Lightning talk submissions from community members are open until the end of the month — see the community site for details and to reserve a seat.
